title: Fort Greene Squirrel Removal Services | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal in Fort Greene, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & attic cleanup. Serving brownstones & historic homes. Call for fast service!
intro: Fort Greene residents facing squirrel invasions need prompt, professional removal services to protect their historic homes and modern residences. Our expert squirrel removal team specializes in humane trapping, exclusion work, and damage repair throughout this vibrant Brooklyn neighborhood. With pricing ranging from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, we provide comprehensive solutions tailored to Fort Greene's unique architecture.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has extensive experience servicing Fort Greene's diverse housing stock, from century-old brownstones to contemporary condos along the park. Our technicians understand the specific entry points squirrels exploit in historic buildings and provide lasting solutions that preserve your property's character while ensuring complete wildlife exclusion.
localContext: Fort Greene's tree-lined streets and proximity to Fort Greene Park create an ideal habitat for squirrels, which frequently find their way into attics, chimneys, and roof spaces of the area's beautiful brownstones and row houses. The neighborhood's mix of historic architecture and the abundant green space around the park mean homeowners near landmarks like the Soldiers' and Sailors' Memorial Arch must remain vigilant against wildlife intrusions.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Fort Greene?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Fort Greene typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on factors like the number of squirrels, entry points, extent of damage, and whether attic cleanup or insulation replacement is needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Fort Greene brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Fort Greene's historic brownstones and row houses. These older buildings often have gaps in soffits, deteriorated roof edges, and uncapped chimneys that provide easy access for squirrels seeking shelter, especially during fall and winter months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Fort Greene home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Fort Greene are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the complexity of the infestation. We typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call and can perform emergency same-day service for urgent situations involving squirrels in living spaces.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane squirrel removal in Fort Greene?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use only humane, live-catch traps and follow all NYC wildlife regulations for squirrel removal in Fort Greene. After capture, squirrels are relocated according to local guidelines, and we seal all entry points to prevent future intrusions while ensuring no animals are trapped inside.
